programme.title: Ouija House
programme.desc: A girl takes her friends to a house with a dark past for a research project. They unwittingly summon an evil entity with plans of its own who makes the house part of its sinister game.

programme.title: The Duplicate

programme.title: Lajja
programme.desc: The Film follows four women from different backgrounds in India as they unite to fight against misogyny and violence in their society. Forced marriage, domestic abuse, and honor killings are just some of the struggles they face. Through their determination, they discover the strength of the human spirit, inspiring others to join their fight for justice. With a powerful cast and storyline, sheds light on important social issues and the fight for women's rights. Will these women succeed in creating a better future for themselves and future generations?

programme.title: Maqbool
programme.desc: In Mumbai's criminal underworld, the lord of all lords is Jahangir Khan (Pankaj Kapoor). Those loyal to him include Maqbool (Irfan Khan), his chief. But Maqbool is in love with Nimmi (Tabu), Jahangir's mistress, who convinces him to be ambitious and take over the empire. After maneuvering potential rivals out of the way, Maqbool betrays Jahangir, murdering him in his own bed. However, it isn't long before both Maqbool and Nimmi are haunted by the ghosts of their treacherous deeds.

programme.title: Pink
programme.desc: After being molested, Minal, along with her friends, tries to file an FIR against a politician's nephew. When the subsequent case gets rigged, Deepak, a retired lawyer, helps them to fight the case.

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.” “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Promise' MV
programme.desc: The title track “Promise” is an impressive ballad that begins with a minimal piano melody and gradually builds emotional depth as strings are added in the latter half. The lyrics, written by DOYOUNG, capture the feelings he couldn't easily express as his love grew deeper. Even if the confession comes late, it delivers a sincerity and emotional resonance stronger than any other words.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire.

programme.desc: The idea of flying cars has largely remained science fiction, until now a new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon these efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy but to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.But a Bloomberg investigation reveals that several private hospital companies funded.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis. (S1 E01)

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion. (S1 E01)

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: A uniquely emotional documentary that will touch the heart of audiences around the world. Four female climbers face the sporting challenge of a lifetime as they attempt to compete in the first ever Olympic climbing competition at Tokyo 2020.

programme.title: King in the Love
programme.desc: Set in the Goryeo dynasty, it tells the story of a young and ambitious monarch Won (Im Si-wan) with a desire to conquer, and two people who shape his destiny childhood friend Wang Rin (Hong Jong-hyun) and a beautiful young woman named San (Im Yoon-ah).

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: For a Michigan family, winning isn't everything, it is the only thing when a competition heats up, the family members wind up doing the unthinkable, and their Midwestern community comes face to face with multiple rounds of pure evil.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: Neighbors Kay Parsons and Becky Sears are practically family, working together and raising their children side by side, but being so close leads to scandal and murder, leaving both families forever damaged.

programme.title: Dates From Hell: Dr. Feelgood

programme.desc: Greed, jealousy and the quest for power threatens the Woodman family's lavish lifestyle as a vicious plot unfolds.

programme.title: Evil Kin

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: When a Korean family starts a new life in the United States, their American dream soon becomes a nightmare as they find out the road to riches is paved with betrayal and blood.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: Ed and Minnie Maurin believe in kindness above all else, then evil strikes the sweet couple police must navigate a long and winding road of secrets and deception to bring the elderly couple's killers to justice.

programme.title: Rajdhani
programme.desc: In this episode of Rajdhani, senior journalist Pankaj Jha explains two big political stories shaping Indian politics. The show looks at Purnesh Modi's comeback in Gujarat BJP and the growing crisis inside Assam Congress.

programme.title: Param Anand
programme.desc: In Param Anand Episode 14, we present the best films and series of 2025, curated by Gajendra Singh Bhati from The Lallantop. From big blockbusters to hidden gems, these titles stood out for storytelling, ideas, and impact.

programme.title: Aasan Bhasha Mein
programme.desc: Aasan Bhasha Mein | in this episode, we explain the controversy after PMO said questions on PM CARES, PMNRF, and NDF cannot be raised in Lok Sabha. Know the history, purpose, and transparency debate around these three key funds.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: A huge controversy broke out in the Madhya Pradesh Assembly when Minister Kailash Vijayvargiya told Umang Singhar “Aukat Mein Raho.” The clash happened during a heated debate over Adani's Rs. 1.25 lakh crore power deal.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: At the AI Impact Summit in Delhi, Google CEO Sundar Pichai tasted India's famous GI-tagged Malabar Arabica coffee. This video explains what GI tags mean and why they are important for Indian products.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: Gold worth Rs. 15 lakh was accidentally sold as scrap in a shocking mistake. Six months later, the scrap dealer returned it, proving that honesty still exists.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: Robo dogs became the highlight of the AI Summit in Delhi, with many companies showing their advanced robots. But why do tech companies mostly build robo dogs and not robo lions or cats? This video explains the reason.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: Donald Trump claimed that he stopped the India-Pakistan conflict by threatening a 200% tariff. However, India denied this and said the ceasefire was achieved through direct talks between the two countries.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: This video explains the Supreme Court hearing on activist Sonam Wangchuk's detention under the National Security Act. Senior Advocate Kapil Sibal questioned the government's claims during the intense legal battle.

programme.title: Netanagri
programme.desc: In this Netanagari segment, we discuss the politics of Uttar Pradesh, where leaders of the Bharatiya Janata Party government appear divided on the same issue. Different statements by Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath and Deputy CM Brajesh Pathak have raised many political questions.

programme.title: Ground Report
programme.desc: Chaos erupted at Delhi University's North Campus on February 13, 2026, after protests over the UGC Equity Regulations 2026 turned violent. The Lallantop team spoke to YouTuber Ruchi Tiwari to understand what really happened.

programme.title: GITN
programme.desc: Guest in the Newsroom | in this episode, former Air Chief Marshal BS Dhanoa answers tough questions on Balakot, Operation Sindoor, Abhinandan vs F-16, and the truth behind cloud cover claims. A rare, no-filter look at India's air wars, strategy, and decision-making from the man who led the IAF.

programme.title: Baithki
programme.desc: Baithki | In this episode, filmmaker Bharatbala shares untold stories behind iconic works like ‘Vande Mataram' and the film Maryan, including a real-life incident involving Dhanush. He also talks about his ambitious Virtual Bharat project and memories with legends like A.R. Rahman and Gulzar.

programme.title: Kitabwala
programme.desc: Welcome to Kitabwala, Lallantop's weekly book show. Writer Manu Joseph talks about inequality in India and asks why the poor do not rise against the rich.

programme.title: Rakhwale
programme.desc: Rakhwale 2.0 | in this first episode, host Vikas Verma speaks with retired IAF Wing Commander Arijit Ghosh as he shares inspiring real-life stories of courage and sacrifice. A gripping account of the Indian Air Force's valour and the spirit of those who guard our skies.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.3
programme.desc: The ghost trio (Fat Minister, Attendant Song, and Rang) crosses the Samdo River (river to the underworld) and lingers around Lee Rin. Meanwhile, King Kisan is unable to sleep due to Sadam's spell.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.4

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.5
programme.desc: Kisan draws his sword on Lee Rin, accusing him of lying about his ability to see ghosts. Meanwhile, Sadam identifies Do Ha as a shaman of the Hae-wol, Hae-il, and Hae-si, and brings her before Kisan.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.6
programme.desc: Lee Rin, clinging to a narrow ledge on a cliff, is pulled up to safety by Do Ha. The ghost trio tells Lee Rin and Do Ha to flee while they lure away the military officers.

programme.title: Flying a kite
programme.desc: The adorable cubbies want to fly kites but struggle to launch their kites in the sky. With the power of cuddles, they embark on a magical adventure, learning the art of kite flying and discovering the str_hinth of their friendship.

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Alien Invasion

Janefinds a torch and uses it as a weapon to defend herself

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness Ep 18.mp4
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 31.mp4
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 26 Part A.mp4
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 01.mp4
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Miranda makes a cure to cheer up Mia, but she runs out of Happy Bird Eggs!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Max and Mike argue about who is the strongest monster

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Miranda takes a drive through the forest and hears a humming noise coming from a rock on the side of the mountain, which suddenly pulls her towards it

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Mia is blown away in a strong wind while trying to retrieve Miranda' s kite, and the Monster Trucks are in pursuit!

programme.title: Argo' s World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.desc: Road to Gymkhana Grid is a feature documentary following eight world-class drivers' journey to South Africa to compete in the world drifting championship event.

programme.title: Jndia: The Fast Life
programme.desc: Meet Jndia Erbacher. Just a normal girl who likes partying, holidaying and driving drag cars at 550KMPH! Watch Jndia racing dragsters across Europe and become the fastest woman on Earth.

programme.title: Twist the Throttle
programme.desc: The Monster Energy riders let us into their lives as they battle for glory across an epic FIM Speedway Grand Prix season. We go behind the scenes to take you closer than ever before to the men behind the helmet

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Since 2012, Graveyard Carz has become synonymous with high-quality Mopar Restoration. And the show continues to grow with new fans and new builds each and every year. We pull the curtain back to reveal some of the cast and crew's favorite moments.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The crew begins door and panel alignment on a '69 Charger Mark realizes he's spread too thin to catch important quality-control issues. Mark decides to assign Allysa to be his shop foreman, despite her protests.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The crew works on final assembly for a problematic '69 GTX Allysa discovers they face major fines following an OSHA inspection. The network rejects a scene from an episode forcing Mark to review all of the comedy routines he's done in the past.

programme.title: MTB Heroes
programme.desc: We meet with a Spanish MTB pro rider who decided to create his own company in order to build the most exclusive and unique carbon bikes.

programme.title: MTB Heroes
programme.desc: We travel to Bali - Indonesia to meet an MTB pro rider who decided to start a new life dividing his time between surfing and riding active volcanos.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Camping vans become increasingly popular - even more popular than SUVs. Volkswagen want to get their share with the Grand California. We test the Grand California during a wildlife trip on the island of Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: DS - The Saviour of the French Noblesse?
programme.desc: After the debut of the Citroën DS, there has been no other premium car from France, even though the country is known for savoir vivre and luxury. The DS7 Crossback now presents itself as a premium SUV. We tested the car in three different categories.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: AMG dares to take on the Mercedes-Benz A-Class and creates a true racing machine with the A 45 S. Also: the Q3 Sportback, Audi's coupé SUV, in the test. And: can the Kia XCeed convince in comparison to the competition?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: Premium cars of yesterday and today
programme.desc: How does the DS7 perform after six months in service? Also: can the DS7 Crossback convince a die-hard classic car fan? And: which Volvo S60 can do more? The T4 with petrol engine or the T8 Hybrid?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Opel freshens up the Insignia, giving it a new engine and new headlights. In addition, Volkswagen presents the T6.1 before the launch of the T7. And: can the Nissan Juke convince with its new design?

programme.title: Glemseck 101
programme.desc: At the Glemseck 101 motorcycle festival.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: GT, those two letters stand for vehicles that combine sportiness with long-distance comfort. One of the most beautiful models of this category is the Maserati Gran Turismo S. With the 570GT, English sports car manufacturer McLaren introduced its first grand tourer. It was supposed to be the most comfortable and most suitable McLaren for long distances, while still retaining its sports car genes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Mercedes launches a new cabriolet offensive. For the first time ever, the C class is available as open-top models. The C43 AMG acts as the entry-level model to the Mercedes-AMG cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well. The S model Porsche's characteristic sporty setup make for the perfect open-air feeling.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. It features the finest materials and an impressive V12 engine. Range Rover, however, took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet. The iconic manufacturer combined two things that usually don't really fit together: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. Still, it's one of the most performance-oriented convertibles in the world. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level. This exclusive convertible opened a new chapter in the success story of Rolls Royce.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aston Martin's DB series bears the initials of David Brown, the man who after the Second World War brought new glory to the British brand. With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Cadillac Escalade
programme.desc: Cadillac's luxurious SUV Escalade.

programme.title: The Iconic

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Star Guide

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: GOAT
programme.desc: Who was involved in the greatest sporting cheating scandal of all time?

programme.title: The Inside Line

programme.title: Only Live Once
programme.desc: This week the best BMX riders in the world meet in Cheng Du, in China. In Austria, the biggest European youth event in mountain biking offers three days of pure action.

programme.title: Only Live Once
programme.desc: A foretaste of the indoor action in Stuttgart, where every year the Porsche Arena hosts the Adidas Rockstars, a world class climbing competitions before a big audience.

programme.title: Only Live Once
programme.desc: Only Live Once presents action from the FISE World Series from two different sites: Malaysia will cover the skate park while in CHENG DU, in China, we will concentrate on the best of the BMX fleet.

programme.title: Only Live Once

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.desc: The black flame centipede doesn't disappoint. Mark is bitten and nearly instantly regrets it in this creepy crawler showcase.Mark finds the bizarre ‘murder leaf,' a mysterious plant rumored to harm creatures on contact. Is the myth real? He investigates firsthand.

programme.title: Bitten by the Biggest Ant in the World!
programme.desc: The largest ant in the world? Mark puts its jaws to the test in an unforgettable, up-close bite challenge.Face-to-face with a killer hornet, Mark accepts another sting challenge to educate viewers about hornet defense and behavior.

programme.title: Stung by a Big Blue Bee!
programme.desc: A massive, electric-blue bee with a sting to match! Mark tests its painful jab while exploring its striking coloration and behavior.Meet the assassin bug: nature's silent killer. Mark gets bitten and shows how this bug dispatches prey with surgical precision.

programme.title: Prehistoric Creature Found Alive! (Trilobite Beetle)
programme.desc: It looks like something from another era—and it is! Mark discovers a trilobite beetle, a living relic that predates the dinosaurs.This giant black bee is more than just big—it's aggressive. Mark takes the sting and shows why it's one of the most feared pollinators.

programme.title: 5 Deadly Tick Bites You Need to Worry About!
programme.desc: A deep dive into the five most dangerous tick bites—what to look for, how to avoid them, and why they're more threatening than they seem.A fierce jungle standoff unfolds as a jaguar faces off with a caiman. Coyote breaks down the tactics, strength, and outcomes of this epic duel.

programme.title: I Caught a 300lb River Monster!
programme.desc: A legendary catch! Coyote reels in a 300-pound river monster and showcases the sheer strength and survival of this freshwater beast.This slime isn't alien—it's animal. But which one made it? Coyote follows the trail to uncover a gooey mystery.

programme.title: Yuck! What Creature Made This Slime?!
programme.desc: Mystery slime appears on the forest floor—what creature left it behind? The team investigates this sticky situation.As part of #CampYouTube, Mark builds a tide pool aquarium and fills it with sea creatures from the coast—perfect for learning from home.

programme.title: For the Love of Wolves!
programme.desc: Wolves need our help. Coyote partners with conservationists to share the story of these vital predators and how to support their future.

programme.title: Caught! Dangerous, Blue, & Bloated!
programme.desc: Coyote pulls up a strange, bloated blue creature from the water. Is it dangerous or just misunderstood? The team investigates.Coyote faces the GIANT silk caterpillar, whose spiny body delivers a nasty sting. Pain, science, and stunning slow-motion footage await.

programme.title: You Won't Believe This Sailfish Catch!
programme.desc: Coyote reels in a record-breaking sailfish and takes viewers on a high-seas journey filled with education, adrenaline, and ocean conservation.Looks can be deceiving. Dumb cane, a common plant, releases chemicals that scorch skin. Coyote finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Stung by the Dragon Flame Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The dragon flame caterpillar may be tiny, but its sting is fiery. Coyote gets up close—and pays the price.Even plants can pack a punch. Coyote explores a Costa Rican bush with stinging leaves that deliver an unexpectedly sharp pain.

programme.title: Snapped by World's Fastest Jaws!
programme.desc: Mark demonstrates the power of nature's fastest jaws—those of the trap-jaw ant. The slow-motion footage is as impressive as the speed.What's a mud dauber wasp? A surprisingly painful stinger! Mark shows how this lesser-known species defends its nest.

programme.title: Monster Ant Chews to the Bone!
programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.title: Stung by a Bullet Ant! (Truth Revealed)
programme.desc: At long last, the bullet ant returns! Mark faces this infamous insect again to reveal updated insights into its sting—and why it's feared globally.Can gloves actually stop a venomous snake bite? Coyote puts bite-proof gear to the test against real fangs.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are missing the Big Apple -- especially the food -- so to crush the craving, she whips up pastrami sandwiches with onion rings, hearty chicken kreplach soup and, for dessert, beautiful black and pink cookies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting her own spin on some of her favorite dishes to make a fun meal for Nick and her dad the menu includes Molly's Chicago Dog Meatloaf with Mustard Glaze, a Salt-and-Vinegar Potato Galette and more.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is preparing make-ahead meals in anticipation of the birth of her first child there's a freezer-friendly version of sweet potato and black bean burritos, mini spinach and artichoke chicken casseroles and potato bagel breakfast sandwiches.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly makes comforting sweet flatbreads with lemon yogurt whipped cream for lunch to keep them warm then she prepares an even cozier dinner of spiced chicken pot pies, crispy chili brussel sprouts and halva apple pie bars.

programme.title: Highway On My Plate
programme.desc: Meet Rocky and Mayur - the highway stars with an attitude! Their tastes change with every kilometer as they hitch-hike their way across the country.

programme.title: Chakh Le India-Kacha Rasta
programme.desc: The quirky Aditya Bal is back on the road, and in this case, on the 'kachcha raasta'. Yes! this time on CHAKH LE - INDIA Aditya hits the road less travelled into the unexplored, and forgotten pockets of India in his hunt for authentic flavours.

programme.title: Band Baajaa Bride
programme.desc: Band Baajaa Bride-The Makeover Show, gives Indian Brides a chance to look like a model by selecting a dream outfit, getting the best make up in the industry and working with the best hairstylists, getting her skin treated and losing weight with experts.

programme.title: Chakh Le India
programme.desc: Chakh Le India! is a series aimed at discovering different cities in India through their regional cuisines. The viewer embarks on a journey with anchor Aditya Bal as he travels through India sampling the local flavours of each city.

programme.title: My Yellow Table
programme.desc: A cookery show wherein India's greatest master chef Kunal Kapoor shares his favourite recipes.

programme.title: Chakh Le India-Kacha Rasta
programme.desc: The quirky Aditya Bal is back on the road, and in this case, on the 'kachcha raasta'. Yes! this time on CHAKH LE - INDIA Aditya hits the road less travelled into the unexplored, and forgotten pockets of India in his hunt for authentic flavours.

programme.title: Bachelors Kitchen
programme.desc: Imaginative, bold, fast and amazing fun that's how one likes to spend time in the kitchen! Whether it's cooking for friends, family, girlfriends, boyfriends, co-workers or even enemies.We're going to show you how it's done!

programme.title: Lock Stock And Two Smoking Tikkas
programme.desc: Marut Sikka knows authentic Indian flavours like nobody else. From Kashmir to Kanyakumari, and West Bengal to Gujarat, he delves into the secrets of each region and brings out its special flavours.

programme.title: Find Me A Classic

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles

programme.title: MTB Heroes

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and team at Muscle Cars of Texas are working on a frame restoration on the 1972 Corvette. From Ugly to beautiful. The 59 Ford pickup truck is ready to go home to the owner. The 1964 Corvette Fuelie gets a new bumper.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: The 63 Z06 is getting more fiber glass work done on the inside. Vinnie is working on replacing the windows on the 442 and putting the guts in the door. Plus, we head to Galveston for the Galveston Corvette Show.

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider
